_metadata.description: RYBAT RSS Feed Registry - All UN Member States with Geographic Coordinates
coverage: National news sources organized by country
Multiple sources per country for diversity
usage_notes: Enable 'global' and 'osint' groups for worldwide coverage
Enable country-specific groups for targeted coverage
Use 'FROM WITHIN' mode for source-based filtering
Use 'ABOUT' mode for content-based AI filtering
Feeds with lat/lon are filtered by bounding box in FROM_WITHIN mode
coordinate_notes: lat/lon represent the headquarters or primary editorial location
Global outlets use their main HQ location
Feeds without coordinates are always included (backwards compatible)

global.description: Worldwide news coverage - major international outlets
